title: Badger - REKT
relevance_summary: Unlimited wallet approvals via increaseAllowance() followed by token drain on DeFi platform

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls increaseAllowance() with non-zero value

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls increaseAllowance() with non-zero value
summary: Badger DAO lost $120 million due to an attacker exploiting unlimited wallet approvals via increaseAllowance(). A guard could have blocked such transactions before they executed.
